executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Israel claims over 200 strikes on Iran and Hezbollah targets. US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman cont. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Israel claims over 200 strikes on Iran and Hezbollah targets
key_developments.detail: The Israeli military says it has carried out more than 200 air strikes over the weekend targeting sites in Iran and Lebanon. It said the attacks in Iran hit air defence systems, ballistic missile production facilities and an IRGC weapons storage site. In Lebanon, the military said it struck a Hezbol

key_developments.headline: US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman cont
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump has threatened that "all hell would rain down on" Iran if it did not make a deal, prompting Tehran to respond with similar rhetoric. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
